name: Heath Candy Bar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar, flour, and butter until well combined.
2. In another bowl, beat together the egg, salt, milk, baking soda, and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just mixed.
4. Reserve 1 cup of this mixture in a separate bowl.
5. Add the remaining flour mixture, crushed Heath candy bars, and chopped pecans to the reserved dough.
6. Stir until all ingredients are well incorporated.
7. Pour the batter into a greased baking pan and spread evenly.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
9. Let cool completely before removing from the pan.
